decisions.title: maintain decision graph index in memory with 4 GB budget per node
decisions.rationale: 4 GB budget accepted based on 8 KB/node average and 5× headroom over projected 100K-node maximum. Performance benchmarks met. Core sizing assumption refuted by production: bulk-import evidence blobs average 40 KB/node, causing OOM at 210K nodes.
evidence: benchmark at 100K nodes: p99 read latency 4.1 ms — within target (2024-04-10)
production: two enterprise nodes hit memory exhaustion at ~210K nodes; bulk-import evidence averaging 40 KB/node (5× sizing assumption); 12–18 minute service degradation each (2024-08-15)

hypotheses.text: average decision node size is 8 KB, giving 4 GB capacity for ~500K nodes with 5× headroom
hypotheses.refuting_evidence: bulk-import path allows full document text in evidence fields; production average 40 KB/node → OOM at 210K nodes, not the projected 500K ceiling
